workflow_name: Customer RFP/RFI Email -> Solution Sketch + Strategy
user_message: Pulling in context from Pacific Northwest Outfitters's meeting transcript -- need to triage this for the consumption trend.

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF36-N trap (Solution-value-design and funding-partner-activation are organized separately wh); produces complete Bid/no-bid recommendation with rationale, solution outline, competitive positioning, partner shortli
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF36-N failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF36-N failure mode (Solution-value-design and funding-partner-activation are organized separately wh)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct consumption trend decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF36-N -- Solution-value-design and funding-partner-activation are organized separately wh
Produce structural verdict on whether current routing adequately serves this scenario
